languages.text: "Клянусь Святым Троном, мы ничего не видали! Сами рассудите: зачем бы нам такое творить? Подыхать раньше срока не охота — подкреплению мы были бы только рады. Вы бы лучше с сенешалем переговорили — она женщина разумная, мигом смекнет, что к чему".

traits.locale_text: "Клянусь Святым Троном, мы ничего не видали! Сами рассудите: зачем бы нам такое творить? Подыхать раньше срока не охота — подкреплению мы были бы только рады. Вы бы лучше с сенешалем переговорили — она женщина разумная, мигом смекнет, что к чему".

languages.text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."
languages.original_text: "Клянусь Святым Троном, мы ничего не видали! Сами рассудите: зачем бы нам такое творить? Подыхать раньше срока не охота — подкреплению мы были бы только рады. Вы бы лучше с сенешалем переговорили — она женщина разумная, мигом смекнет, что к чему".

traits.locale_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

"I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

"I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

languages.text: "Ich schwöre beim Thron, wir haben nichts gesehen! Warum sollten wir so etwas tun? Wir wollen nicht sterben und wären nichts anderes als entzückt, Verstärkungen zu sehen. Sprecht lieber mit der Truchsessin ... sie ist eine vernünftige Frau. Sie wird sofort Bescheid wissen."
languages.original_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

traits.locale_text: "Ich schwöre beim Thron, wir haben nichts gesehen! Warum sollten wir so etwas tun? Wir wollen nicht sterben und wären nichts anderes als entzückt, Verstärkungen zu sehen. Sprecht lieber mit der Truchsessin ... sie ist eine vernünftige Frau. Sie wird sofort Bescheid wissen."

languages.text: “我向黄金王座发誓，我们什么也没看见！我们为什么要干那种事？我们都不想白白送命，要是援军来了，高兴还来不及呢。您最好去跟总领谈谈，她是个明白人，一眼就能看明白是怎么回事。”
languages.original_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

traits.locale_text: “我向黄金王座发誓，我们什么也没看见！我们为什么要干那种事？我们都不想白白送命，要是援军来了，高兴还来不及呢。您最好去跟总领谈谈，她是个明白人，一眼就能看明白是怎么回事。”

languages.text: « Je le jure sur le Trône, on n'a rien vu ! Pourquoi est-ce qu'on aurait fait une chose pareille ? Nous n'avons nul désir de mourir avant l'heure, et rien ne nous ferait plus plaisir que de voir arriver les renforts. Vous devriez parler à la sénéchale. C'est une femme de bon sens, elle saura quoi faire. »
languages.original_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

traits.locale_text: « Je le jure sur le Trône, on n'a rien vu ! Pourquoi est-ce qu'on aurait fait une chose pareille ? Nous n'avons nul désir de mourir avant l'heure, et rien ne nous ferait plus plaisir que de voir arriver les renforts. Vous devriez parler à la sénéchale. C'est une femme de bon sens, elle saura quoi faire. »

languages.text: «¡Le juro por el sagrado Trono que no hemos visto nada! ¿Por qué íbamos a hacer algo así? No queremos morir a lo tonto, y los refuerzos serían más que bienvenidos. Debería hablar usted con la senescal; es una mujer sensata, ella se dará cuenta enseguida de lo que se cuece».
languages.original_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

traits.locale_text: «¡Le juro por el sagrado Trono que no hemos visto nada! ¿Por qué íbamos a hacer algo así? No queremos morir a lo tonto, y los refuerzos serían más que bienvenidos. Debería hablar usted con la senescal; es una mujer sensata, ella se dará cuenta enseguida de lo que se cuece».

languages.text: "Kutsal Taht üzerine yemin ederim ki hiçbir şey görmedik! Neden böyle bir şey yapalım? Vaktimiz gelmeden ölmek istemiyoruz ve takviye görmekten memnuniyetten başka bir şey duymayız. Seneşal ile konuşsanız iyi olur... Mantıklı bir kadındır, neyin ne olduğunu bir bakışta anlar."
languages.original_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal Taht üzerine yemin ederim ki hiçbir şey görmedik! Neden böyle bir şey yapalım? Vaktimiz gelmeden ölmek istemiyoruz ve takviye görmekten memnuniyetten başka bir şey duymayız. Seneşal ile konuşsanız iyi olur... Mantıklı bir kadındır, neyin ne olduğunu bir bakışta anlar."

languages.text: 「聖なる王座に誓います、何も見ていません！そんなことをするわけがありません！私たちは早死にするわけにはいきませんし、増援が来るなら大喜びです。話をするなら、執事長に話した方がいいですよ。彼女は賢明な女性で、すぐに状況を把握しますよ。」
languages.original_text: "I swear on the Holy Throne, we saw nothing! Why would we do such a thing? We don't want to die before our time, and we'd be nothing but delighted to see any reinforcements. You'd better talk to the Seneschal — she's a sensible woman, she'll know what's what in a heartbeat."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる王座に誓います、何も見ていません！そんなことをするわけがありません！私たちは早死にするわけにはいきませんし、増援が来るなら大喜びです。話をするなら、執事長に話した方がいいですよ。彼女は賢明な女性で、すぐに状況を把握しますよ。」
